summary: Test suite provides basic coverage of core aggregator functions (parsing, aggregation, flaky detection, rendering) and workflow structure validation, but violates the explicit requirement that all tests must run through act. aggregator.test.ts and workflow-structure.test.ts run unit tests directly via bun test rather than through the CI pipeline. cli.ts is barely tested (no direct unit tests, only indirect coverage via harness). Edge case coverage is sparse: no tests for empty suites, missing JSON fields, self-closing XML tags, status string variants, or CLI error handling (missing directory, no files found). Temporary file management lacks cleanup (files in /tmp not removed). parseResultFile tests have file I/O but could be more comprehensive. The harness.ts properly tests through act with fixture-based end-to-end validation, but exists separately from bun test framework. Would catch major regressions in aggregator core logic and workflow structure, but miss CLI failures and edge cases.
